requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL make durable control signals the source of truth for fiber wake, resume, and interrupt scheduling while keeping signal payloads bounded and separate from message history.

case.given: A wake message such as LLM done, tool done, child done, human input, or heartbeat arrives
case.when: The runtime persists the durable control signal
case.then: The signal SHALL include scheduling metadata sufficient for wake/resume recovery
The signal SHALL NOT duplicate unbounded mailbox payloads that are owned by actor mailbox, transcript, conversation, or artifact persistence

case.given: A signal is pending when the process exits
case.then: The runtime SHALL redeliver the intended mailbox message using the actor mailbox snapshot or payload reference
The fiber SHALL continue without transcript-tail inference
